html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Substrate Extrapolator is a craftable item introduced in the Hostile Takeover update. It gets unlocked after moving the Crabby Hermit away from Hermit Island by giving her a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island. It requires a Notional Fabricator to craft.

The Substrate Extrapolator is a special type of turf kit that can only be placed on the Ocean tiles adjacent to the Hermit Island. When holding the Substrate Extrapolators, available building locations will be highlighted.

After placing all 76 Substrate Extrapolators, the Undisclosed Construct will appear on the Hermit Island and the Phasmo-Encapsulator crafting recipe will be unlocked at the Notional Fabricator.

Crafting the required 76 Substrate Extrapolators requires 19 Cut Stone and 19 Scrap.

Substrate

The Substrate is similar to Dock Kit that can turn Ocean tiles into land. However, it cannot be destroyed in any way.

Gallery

  • Possible placement projection
  • Holding the Substrate Extrapolators shows possible placement projection

“What is this floor?”
–Wilson
“Why didn't he just find a bigger island?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang have more place to do pushup.”
–Wolfgang
“I wonder how the ocean feels about this.”
–Wendy
“MORE LAND EQUALS LESS OCEAN. GOOD”
–WX-78
“It's obviously a method of coastal extension.”
–Wickerbottom
“I prefer wood flooring.”
–Woodie
“Just how much more space does he need?”
–Maxwell
“Njörd will nöt be pleased.”
–Wigfrid
“We'll have more room to play.”
–Webber
“We are expanding this location!”
–Warly
“More big land”
–Wormwood
“Real estate is at a premium these days.”
–Winona
“Score! More floor!”
–Wortox
“Floor...p?”
–Wurt
“I bet we'll be floored by this!”
–Walter
“Hmm, a shortcut to terraformation?”
–Wanda
The Substrate Extrapolator is a craftable item introduced in the Hostile Takeover update. It gets unlocked after moving the Crabby Hermit away from Hermit Island by giving her a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island. It requires a Notional Fabricator to craft.
The Substrate Extrapolator is a special type of turf kit that can only be placed on the Ocean tiles adjacent to the Hermit Island. When holding the Substrate Extrapolators, available building locations will be highlighted.
After placing all 76 Substrate Extrapolators, the Undisclosed Construct will appear on the Hermit Island and the Phasmo-Encapsulator crafting recipe will be unlocked at the Notional Fabricator.
Crafting the required 76 Substrate Extrapolators requires 19 Cut Stone and 19 Scrap.

The '''Substrate Extrapolator''' is a craftable item introduced in the [[Hostile Takeover]] update. It gets unlocked after moving the [[Crabby Hermit]] away from [[Hermit Island]] by giving her a [[Map of Totally Uninhabited Island]]. It requires a [[Notional Fabricator]] to craft. 

The Substrate Extrapolator is a special type of turf kit that can only be placed on the Ocean tiles adjacent to the Hermit Island. When holding the Substrate Extrapolators, available building locations will be highlighted. 

After placing all 76 Substrate Extrapolators, the [[Undisclosed Construct]] will appear on the [[Hermit Island]] and the [[Phasmo-Encapsulator]] crafting recipe will be unlocked at the [[Notional Fabricator]]. 

Crafting the required 76 Substrate Extrapolators requires 19 [[Cut Stone/DST|Cut Stone]] and 19 [[Scrap]].
{{clear}}

== Substrate ==
{{Turf Infobox
|image = Substrate Extrapolator Texture.png
|perk = Expand [[Hermit Island]].
}}
The '''Substrate''' is similar to [[Dock Kit]] that can turn Ocean tiles into land. However, it cannot be destroyed in any way.

{{clear}}
